text.message: If only you could’ve blocked a spot with 2 of us on and still taken from me
im sure there are perfect worlds
we're just not living in one of them
blue, why would you risk like that?
i had much better shot of getting there first
it was pretty difficult for you
you needed multiple 5s to roll before I got one 6/8
and then a lay-up of a trade
and even without it i had the resources
i still think that since i was there and you still needed an extra road, you should have backed off
you had 2 cards when I built that road haha
Should’ve backed off???? It’s not your right to that spot
not about right, it's about the chances
of course i dont own it
I know but there is the 10 brick
but yea, the brick 10 on top was a better block
can block both red and green
i got stolen 3 time in a row
